properties.NOTES: LASD 07/12/26 10AM: Wildfire in Jesus Canyon area. EVACUATION WARNING remains in place between Fort Tejon Rd and 233rd St E to Boneyard Canyon. All other areas are back to normal and residents may resume activities. Stay cautious and aware of surroundings. Follow instructions from local authorities. For emergency assistance call 911. AlertLA.org
